candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue figure; matches target definition of total revenue/sales better than aggregate including other income.
Label suggests revenue but values are all nan in preview and there is a clearer populated 'Revenues' line.
This is an operating expense, not revenue; incorrect for REVT.
Includes other income; less precise than pure revenues for top-line sales.

candidates.row_label: Changes in fair value of derivatives, negative  (revenue/other income adj.)
candidates.why: Adjustment item, not total revenue.

candidates.row_label: Changes in fair value of derivatives, positive  (revenue/other income adj.)
candidates.why: Adjustment item, not total revenue.

candidates.row_label: Loss on sale of assets (revenue/other income adj.)
candidates.why: Specific gain/loss adjustment, not total revenue.

variables.notes: Top-line sales are clearly labeled as 'Revenues' and match the numeric pattern used in totals.

candidates.why: Working-capital adjustment often used with COGS but not itself labeled as cost of sales; prefer explicit COGS line.
Explicit COGS label; matches target definition of direct production costs.
Balance sheet inventory component, not an income statement expense.

variables.notes: Explicit COGS row exists and should be used over related inventory change adjustments.

candidates.why: Broad operating expense bucket, but an explicit SG&A-type line ('Sales and administration costs') exists and is populated; per hierarchy, prefer that specific SG&A line.
Clear SG&A-type label, populated across years, best representation of overhead per hierarchy rule (explicit SG&A populated → select only that row).
Explicit SG&A label but appears empty in preview while 'Sales and administration costs' is already populated; hierarchy favors the populated explicit SG&A line alone.
Could be SG&A component, but line appears empty and is less clear than the main SG&A bucket.

candidates.row_label: Gain on sale of assets (operating/administrative expenses)
candidates.why: This is a gain/adjustment, not an ongoing SG&A expense; should be excluded from SG&A components.

variables.notes: Following rule (a): populated explicit SG&A-type line exists, so only that row is chosen for XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Explicitly labeled total R&D expense; directly matches XRD definition.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D line present; no ambiguity.

candidates.why: Interest income, not expense; not appropriate for XINT which targets interest expense.
Label suggests interest expense, but preview values are nan whereas a more detailed explicit 'Interest Expense' line with data exists; use that instead.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses and other financial expenses
candidates.why: Includes other financial expenses beyond pure interest; prefer the more specific 'Interest Expense' line for XINT.
Interest on lease liabilities only; a subset of total interest expense.
Explicit, populated line for interest expense (net of capitalized interest elsewhere); best match for total interest expense.
Broad category mixing interest with other finance expenses; less precise than 'Interest Expense'.
Earnings attribution, not interest.
Earnings attributable to minorities, not interest.
Capitalized portion of interest; XINT generally uses the expensed interest line instead.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental subset of interest expense (leases only).
Balance sheet asset; explicitly non-interest-bearing; irrelevant for XINT.
Equity component, not interest.
Equity component, not interest.

variables.notes: Uses the main explicit interest expense line rather than broader or subset finance expense lines.

candidates.row_label: Net income/(loss) from equity accounted investments
candidates.why: Income statement line, not stock of equity; not suitable for book equity.

candidates.row_label: Attributable to equity holders of the company
candidates.why: Income attribution, not the equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Share of OCI from equity accounted investments
candidates.why: OCI component, not total equity.

candidates.row_label: Attributable to the equity holders of the company
candidates.why: Again an income/OCI attribution, not a balance sheet equity total.
Profits from equity-accounted investments; not an equity stock measure.
Non-current asset investment, not the company’s own equity.

candidates.row_label: Payables to equity accounted companies and other related parties
candidates.why: Liability to related parties, not equity.
Represents equity attributable to shareholders but excludes non-controlling interests; slightly less complete than total equity for BE.
Component of equity related to equity-accounted investees, not the total equity balance.
Explicit total equity line including components; best representation of book equity.

variables.notes: Total Equity chosen as comprehensive book equity measure rather than shareholder-only portion.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution to non-controlling interests; aligns conceptually with minority interest but BE-level balance sheet figure is preferred if available.
Same income attribution figures; redundant with previous line; prefer balance sheet stock figure for MIB.
Balance sheet component representing minority equity; best match for MIB definition.
Duplicate of non-controlling interest concept with same numbers; either would work, but 'Non-controlling interests' is more standard/current terminology.

candidates.row_label: Total Comprehensive Income attributable to Minority Interest
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not the equity balance; less suitable for MIB.

variables.notes: Uses the balance sheet minority equity account as MIB, which matches the definition of minority interest/non-controlling interests.
